nodes.title: Output Size Limit 结果分辨率

widgets_values:
If you don't have powerful GPU, lower the size limit to 1280, 1024 or lower.
如果显存不够，把这个结果分辨率调低点到1280，1024 或更低。

true=only swap face（换脸）
false=swap the head (换头)

nodes.title: Main Prpmpt 主图提示词
widgets_values: 参照图像1和图像2，图像1人物换上图像2的头和脸，保持图像1人物肤色一致性和自然光影。

nodes.title: Reference Prompt 参考图提示词
widgets_values: remove the hair of the person in image 1, remove the long hair, and edit it to make them bald, while keeping everything else unchanged.

nodes.title: Reference Prompt 参考图提示词
widgets_values: 移除图1人的头发，移除长发，编辑成光头，其他内容保持不变.

nodes.title: Main Prpmpt(head) 主图提示词(头)
widgets_values: Referring to Images 1 and 2, replace the person's face in Image 1 with the face from Image 2, while keeping the natural hairstyle of Image 1, natural lighting, and face skin color consistency.

The auto mask checking may fail. in that case, unlink this boolean value,and set the value manually to true or false.

蒙版自动检测可能会失败，如果失败，请断开这个boolean 链接， 再手动设置。

true=use default mask(使用默认蒙版)
false=use manual mask(使用手动蒙版)

Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model links (for local users)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)
- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-9b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-9b.safetensors)
- [flux-2-klein-4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/flux-2-klein-4b.safetensors)
- [flux-2-klein-base-9b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9b-fp8)
- [flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors)

**GGUF**
- [GGUF 9B](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF/tree/main)
- [GGUF 4B](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-4B-GGUF/tree/main)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)

**loras**

- [solo girl](https://civitai.com/models/2319552/nsfw-flux-klein-no-face-change)
- [unchained-xxx](https://civitai.com/models/2348977/klein-9b-unchained-xxx)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      ├── flux-2-klein-base-4b.safetensors
│   │      └── flux-2-klein-4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │      ├── flux-2-klein-9b-Q4_0.gguf
│   │     
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      ├── KLEIN-Unchained-V1.safetensors
│   │    
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

## Report issue

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare the required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Main Prpmpt(face) 主图提示词(脸)
widgets_values: Referring to Images 1 and 2, replace the person's face in Image 1 with the face from Image 2, while keeping the natural hairstyle, natural lighting, and face skin color of the person in Image 1.

IF the head is too big in result, try increasing the scale factor in this node or totally disable this node.

如果在结果中头太大，尝试提高这个节点的scale factor 值，或者直接禁用这个节点。

groups.title: If you like it, please sub to my channel.(喜欢请点个关注!)
